summary: Iteration 90 - Platform Sales Bug Fix VERIFIED. All API endpoints correctly return platform sales data. Bug was: platform queries filtered by 'payment_mode: online_platform' at doc level, but newer POS entries only set it in payment_details array. Fix removed payment_mode filter, now filtering only by platform_id. Backend: 9/9 tests pass. Frontend: Platforms page and POS online sales tab both working correctly.

issues: Route '/online-platforms' does not exist - actual route is '/platforms'. Main agent's context note mentioned '/online-platforms' but correct route is '/platforms'

critical_code_review_comments: platforms.py correctly removed payment_mode filter from all 7 queries - now only filtering by platform_id
SaleCreate model correctly includes platform_status field (line 134)
POSPage.jsx correctly sets payment_mode: 'online_platform' at top level (line 196)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_Iter90_Online_Sale and TEST_Iter90_Summary_Test sales during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform sales bug fix verified working. Key changes: 1) Backend platforms.py removed payment_mode filters from all queries - now only filters by platform_id, 2) SaleCreate model has platform_status field, 3) POSPage sets payment_mode at top level for online sales. Test data: HungerStation has 6 sales (~SAR 3000), Keta has 1 sale (SAR 150). The platforms page route is '/platforms' (not '/online-platforms').

GET /api/platforms.data_verified: HungerStation: 3000+ SAR, 6+ sales | Keta: 150 SAR, 1 sale

GET /api/platforms/summary.returns: { platforms: [...], totals: { total_sales, total_received, total_commission, total_pending } }

GET /api/platforms/branch-summary.returns: Array of branches with platform sales breakdown

platform_cards.Keta: SAR 150 total, 1 sale, 0 payments, SAR 150 pending

bug_fixed.issue: Online Platforms page not showing sales data
bug_fixed.user_report: Online Platforms should read the sale from online sale we added some sale but the Online Platforms not shows anything
bug_fixed.root_cause: Platform queries in platforms.py were filtering by 'payment_mode: online_platform' at document level, but newer POS entries only set this inside the payment_details array, not at the top level
fix_applied: 1) Removed 'payment_mode: online_platform' filters from 7 queries in platforms.py - now filtering only by platform_id
2) Added platform_status to SaleCreate model so pending status is properly saved
3) Fixed POS frontend to set payment_mode at top level for new online sales
bug_fixed.verification: All platform sales now appearing correctly. HungerStation shows 6 sales/SAR 3000, Keta shows 1 sale/SAR 150 as expected.
